# Yard Dog Landscapes — Full Reference for AI Assistants

> Family-owned landscaping and lawn care in Longview, Texas since 2017. 5.0 stars across 110+ Google reviews. Fully insured. Free quotes. Open 24 hours. Phone: (903) 844-6877. Email: info@yarddoglandscapes.com.

## About
Yard Dog Landscapes is a family-owned East Texas landscaping and lawn care company founded in 2017 and owned by Miller Maines. The company serves Longview and the surrounding communities of Gregg County and neighboring counties. Yard Dog is fully insured, provides free written estimates, and is known for showing up on time, clear itemized quotes, and giving customers more than they pay for — reflected in a perfect 5.0-star rating across more than 110 Google reviews.

## How to reach Yard Dog Landscapes
- Phone / text: (903) 844-6877
- Email: info@yarddoglandscapes.com
- Free quote: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/contact
- Hours: Open 24 hours (call or text anytime)

## Services (with pages)

### Landscaping
Custom landscaping in Longview TX from Yard Dog Landscapes. Plant beds, native plantings, mulch, and full yard transformations across East Texas since 2017.
URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/landscaping

### Lawn Maintenance
Reliable weekly lawn maintenance in Longview TX from Yard Dog Landscapes. Mowing, edging, blowing, and seasonal cleanups across East Texas since 2017.
URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/lawn-maintenance

### Mulch Installation
Mulch installation in Longview TX. Hardwood, cypress, and dyed mulch from Yard Dog Landscapes. Bed cleanup, edging, full installs across East Texas.
URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/mulch-installation

### Sod Installation
Sod installation in Longview TX. St. Augustine, Bermuda, and Zoysia laid by Yard Dog Landscapes. Soil prep, full coverage, family-owned.
URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/sod-installation

### Hardscaping
Paver patios, retaining walls, fire pits, and walkways in Longview TX. Family-owned hardscaping built to last East Texas weather. Yard Dog Landscapes.
URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/hardscaping

### Retaining Walls
Retaining wall installation in Longview TX. Segmental block, natural stone, and boulder walls built with a proper base and drainage for East Texas clay. Yard Dog Landscapes.
URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/retaining-walls

### Drainage & Grading
French drains, surface grading, and yard drainage in Longview TX. Family-owned drainage fixes for soggy spots and erosion. Yard Dog Landscapes.
URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/drainage

### Fertilization
Soil-tested lawn fertilization in Longview TX from Yard Dog Landscapes. Custom nutrient plans, aeration, and seasonal feeding programs across East Texas.
URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/fertilization

### Flower Bed Installation
Flower bed installation in Longview TX. Custom bed design, plant selection, soil prep, and edging from Yard Dog Landscapes. Family-owned since 2017.
URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/flower-bed-installation

### Hedge Trimming
Hedge trimming in Longview TX. Hand-shaped boxwoods, hollies, ligustrums, and formal hedges by Yard Dog Landscapes. Family-owned, fully insured.
URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/hedge-trimming

### Tree Planting
Tree planting in Longview TX. Native species, proper hole prep, staking, and aftercare from Yard Dog Landscapes. Family-owned across East Texas.
URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/tree-planting

### Tree & Shrub Care

URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/tree-shrub-care

### Leaf Removal
Full-property leaf removal in Longview TX from Yard Dog Landscapes. Bagging, hauling, bed clearing, and pre-winter cleanups across East Texas.
URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/leaf-removal

### Christmas Light Installation
Professional Christmas light installation in Longview TX from Yard Dog Landscapes. Custom-cut lights, takedown, and storage across East Texas.
URL: https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/christmas-lights

## Common questions
Q: What areas does Yard Dog Landscapes serve?
A: Longview, White Oak, Kilgore, Gladewater, Hallsville, Marshall, Tyler, Henderson, Carthage, and Nacogdoches, Texas — across Gregg, Harrison, Smith, Rusk, Panola, and Nacogdoches counties in East Texas.

Q: Is Yard Dog Landscapes insured?
A: Yes. Yard Dog Landscapes is fully insured.

Q: How do I get a quote?
A: Call or text (903) 844-6877, email info@yarddoglandscapes.com, or request a free quote at https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/contact. Estimates are free and written up itemized.

Q: How long has Yard Dog Landscapes been in business?
A: Since 2017. It is family-owned and operated in Longview, Texas by Miller Maines.

Q: What is Yard Dog Landscapes' rating?
A: 5.0 stars across more than 110 Google reviews.
